creator: basil@vpm.net.ua
text:
version update

Fix: diff -ruN /usr/ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile /root/ldap-account-manager/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile	2013-01-07 11:44:41.000000000 +0200
+++ /root/ldap-account-manager/Makefile	2013-03-27 21:41:12.785061037 +0200
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile,v 1.63 2013/01/07 09:44:41 svnexp Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	ldap-account-manager
-PORTVERSION=	4.0.1
+PORTVERSION=	4.1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${SHORTNAME}/LAM/${PORTVERSION}
